title: 8 Herbal Creams For Tonsillitis
description: Calendula officinalis creams contains bioactive constituents like triterpenoids, flavonoids, and carotenoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in the throat, making them beneficial for tonsillitis. The triterpenoids in Calendula officinalis have been shown to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria, including those that cause tonsillitis.
